name: Cursor SDK
description: Cursor SDK agent harness supporting local and cloud execution via @cursor/sdk.

runtime.label: Runtime
runtime.help: Run Cursor agent locally on the host machine or in a Cursor cloud VM.

model.label: Model
model.help: Default Cursor agent model (e.g. composer-2, composer-2-fast).

cloud.label: Cloud Settings
cloud.help: Configuration for Cursor cloud VM execution.

cloud.repos.label: Repositories
cloud.repos.help: Git repositories to clone into the cloud VM.

cloud.autoCreatePR.label: Auto Create PR
cloud.autoCreatePR.help: Automatically create a pull request from cloud agent changes.

local.cwd.label: Working Directory
local.cwd.help: Override the local agent working directory (defaults to agent workspace).
